title: Alonzo's Bluestone Resource Pack
description: Simple. It replaces all of the Redstone with Bluestone.
body: While working on my mod Bluestone, I wanted to see how my textures look in-game. It looked pretty good so I decided to just put all the textures in and upload it to Modrinth because why not? Don't expect much of it, because I just put all my textures. The Redstone particles and Redstone Wire still look the same because I wasn't able to change them. Maybe I'll come back to this resource pack after I finish my mod, or even before I finish my mod.
